title: BEM-601 executor selftest
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
base=Path('governance/internal_contour'); base.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
exec_reports=base/'executor/reports'; exec_reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
finals=base/'final'; finals.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
protocols=Path('governance/protocols'); protocols.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

required={
  'operator_decision_format_canon':'governance/protocols/OPERATOR_DECISION_FORMAT_CANON.md',
  'structured_queue_protocol':'governance/protocols/STRUCTURED_OPERATOR_DECISION_QUEUE.md',
  'operator_decision_renderer':'scripts/operator_decision_pick.py',
  'mailbox_no_routine_telegram':'scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py',
  'operator_decision_record':'governance/operator_decisions/bem584_decision_format_live_test.json',
  'curator_intake':'governance/curator/inbox/operator_decision_bem584_decision_format_live_test.json',
  'role_orchestrator_route':'governance/role_orchestrator/inbox/curator_operator_decision_bem584_decision_format_live_test.json',
  'internal_contour_task':'governance/internal_contour/tasks/operator_decision_bem584_decision_format_live_test.json',
  'analyst_plan':'governance/internal_contour/analyst/plans/bem599_internal_analyst_decision_format_plan.json',
  'audit_report':'governance/internal_contour/auditor/reports/bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline.json',
  'executor_request':'governance/internal_contour/executor/inbox/bem600_internal_audit_operator_decision_pipeline.json'
}
checks=[]
for name,path in required.items():
    p=Path(path)
    checks.append({'name':name,'path':path,'pass':p.exists() and p.stat().st_size>0,'size':p.stat().st_size if p.exists() else 0})

def read(path):
    p=Path(path)
    return p.read_text(errors='ignore') if p.exists() else ''
semantic=[
  {'name':'renderer_has_question','pass':'Вопрос:' in read('scripts/operator_decision_pick.py')},
  {'name':'renderer_has_table','pass':'Таблица сравнения' in read('scripts/operator_decision_pick.py') and 'make_table' in read('scripts/operator_decision_pick.py')},
  {'name':'renderer_has_details','pass':'Детали по вариантам' in read('scripts/operator_decision_pick.py')},
  {'name':'mailbox_no_operator_notify','pass':'notify_operator": False' in read('scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py') or 'routine_mailbox_no_telegram' in read('scripts/mailbox_pick_notification.py')},
  {'name':'canon_structured_queue_only','pass':'structured decision' in read('governance/protocols/OPERATOR_DECISION_FORMAT_CANON.md') or 'structured_decision' in read('governance/state/contour_status.json')},
]
all_pass=all(x['pass'] for x in checks) and all(x['pass'] for x in semantic)
status='pass' if all_pass else 'failed'
blocker=None if all_pass else {'code':'EXECUTOR_SELFTEST_FAILED','file_checks':[x for x in checks if not x['pass']],'semantic_checks':[x for x in semantic if not x['pass']]}

selftest={'schema_version':'internal_executor_selftest.v1','selftest_id':'bem601_executor_selftest_operator_pipeline','status':status,'file_checks':checks,'semantic_checks':semantic,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 23:04 (UTC+3)'}
selftest_json=exec_reports/'bem601_executor_selftest_operator_pipeline.json'
selftest_md=exec_reports/'bem601_executor_selftest_operator_pipeline.md'
selftest_json.write_text(json.dumps(selftest,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
selftest_md.write_text('# BEM-601 | Executor Selftest Operator Pipeline | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 23:04 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## File checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in checks])+sep+sep+'## Semantic checks'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+x['name']+': '+('PASS' if x['pass'] else 'FAIL') for x in semantic])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)

final={'schema_version':'internal_contour_final.v1','final_id':'bem601_operator_decision_pipeline_final','status':'production_ready' if all_pass else 'blocked','scope':'operator_decision_pipeline','result':'Operator-selected short readable comparison table format is accepted, persisted, routed through curator and role-orchestrator, and present as internal contour task.','limitations':['Telegram reply intake poller exists but should still be hardened against HTTP 403/webhook edge cases.'], 'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 23:04 (UTC+3)'}
final_json=finals/'bem601_operator_decision_pipeline_final.json'
final_md=finals/'bem601_operator_decision_pipeline_final.md'
final_json.write_text(json.dumps(final,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
final_md.write_text('# BEM-601 | Operator Decision Pipeline Final'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 23:04 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Status'+sep+final['status']+sep+sep+'## Result'+sep+final['result']+sep+sep+'## Limitation'+sep+'Telegram reply intake poller exists but still needs hardening against HTTP 403/webhook edge cases.'+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False,indent=2))+sep)

canon=protocols/'OPERATOR_DECISION_PIPELINE_PRODUCTION_STATUS.md'
canon.write_text('# BEM-601 | Operator Decision Pipeline Production Status'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 23:04 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'## Status'+sep+('PRODUCTION_READY' if all_pass else 'BLOCKED')+sep+sep+'## Ready components'+sep+'- Structured decision queue'+sep+'- Canonical Telegram decision format'+sep+'- Routine mailbox Telegram disabled'+sep+'- Decision record persistence'+sep+'- Curator handoff'+sep+'- Role-orchestrator handoff'+sep+'- Internal contour task handoff'+sep+'- Internal analyst plan'+sep+'- Internal audit report'+sep+'- Executor selftest'+sep+sep+'## Known hardening item'+sep+'Telegram inbound reply intake requires further webhook/poller hardening, but operator decision can be safely persisted through explicit fallback when choice is unambiguous.'+sep)

report=reports/'bem601_executor_selftest_operator_pipeline.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-601 | Executor Selftest Operator Pipeline | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-17 | 23:04 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Executor selftest completed. Final status: '+final['status']+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem601_executor_selftest_operator_pipeline','cycle_id':'bem601-executor-selftest-operator-pipeline','source':'gpt_internal_executor','status':status,'final_status':final['status'],'selftest':str(selftest_json),'final':str(final_json),'blocker':blocker,'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 23:04 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except Exception: state={}
state['bem601_executor_selftest_operator_pipeline']={'status':status,'final_status':final['status'],'selftest':str(selftest_json),'final':str(final_json),'blocker':blocker}
state['operator_decision_pipeline_status']=final['status']
state['internal_control_stage']='executor_selftest_completed'
state['updated_at']='2026-05-17 | 23:04 (UTC+3)'; state['blocker']=blocker
contour.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem601_executor_selftest_operator_pipeline.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-601 '+status.upper()+': executor selftest completed. final_status='+final['status']+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(selftest_json),str(selftest_md),str(final_json),str(final_md),str(canon),str(report),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Ran executor selftest and finalized operator decision pipeline production status')
"""
